content: Differentiating features for SME WMS/procurement MIS: barcode scanning to eliminate manual entry errors, automated PO generation when stock hits reorder points (Gartner cites this as highest-impact single feature), supplier performance scorecards tracking on-time delivery and quality, demand forecasting from historical data, multi-channel inventory sync, and configurable approval chains for PO workflows. For academic/MVP scope the most achievable differentiator is smart reorder-threshold management with clear stock health indicators.
